$description: Component tokens for Mobile Select dropdown fields with multiple variants including default, icon leading, avatar leading, search, and tags types. Supports placeholder, default, open, and disabled states across 3 sizes (3xs, 2xs, xs). Figma Reference: Node ID 1059-13248

$component.name: Select
$component.description: A mobile dropdown selection component for choosing from predefined options. Includes chevron indicator, multiple type variants (default, icon leading, avatar leading, search, tags), validation states, and focus indicators. Supports supporting text display and optional dropdown icon.
$component.structure: Container with border, optional leading icon/avatar, selected value display with optional supporting text, optional tags display, chevron icon for dropdown indication, with focus states and validation feedback

sizes.3xs: 32px height - Smallest size for compact mobile interfaces
sizes.2xs: 48px height - Medium size (commonly used default for mobile)
sizes.xs: 56px height - Large size for prominent mobile selects

variants.default: Standard select with neutral colors for normal selection
variants.icon-leading: Select with leading icon for visual context
variants.avatar-leading: Select with leading avatar for user/entity selection
variants.search: Select with search icon for searchable dropdowns
variants.tags: Select with tag display for multi-select scenarios

usage.contexts: Mobile forms, filters, settings panels, data entry interfaces, user selection, team member selection, searchable dropdowns
usage.features: Chevron indicator, validation states, focus indicators, disabled state, icon support, avatar support, tag display, supporting text, search functionality

border.$comment: Border radius and width for mobile select fields

3xs.description: Mobile select border radius for 3xs size - 4px

2xs.description: Mobile select border radius for 2xs size - 8px

xs.description: Mobile select border radius for xs size - 8px

default.description: Mobile select border width for default state - 1px

open.description: Mobile select border width for open/focused state - 3px

padding.$comment: Internal spacing for mobile select content - horizontal (x) and vertical (y) padding

3xs.description: Mobile select horizontal padding for 3xs size - 8px

2xs.description: Mobile select horizontal padding for 2xs size - 8px

xs.description: Mobile select horizontal padding for xs size - 8px

height.$comment: Mobile select field heights for each size variant

xs.description: Mobile select height for xs size - 56px

gap.$comment: Spacing between mobile select elements (icons, text, and chevron)

shadow.$comment: Subtle elevation shadow for mobile select fields

default.description: Mobile select default shadow - outer xs

disabled.description: Mobile select disabled shadow - outer xs

text.$comment: Typography tokens for mobile select text content across all sizes

3xs.description: Mobile select text typography for 3xs size - 14px regular

2xs.description: Mobile select text typography for 2xs size - 16px regular

xs.description: Mobile select text typography for xs size - 18px regular

icon.$comment: Icon sizes for chevron, leading icon, search icon inside mobile select fields

3xs.description: Mobile select chevron icon size for 3xs - 12px

2xs.description: Mobile select chevron icon size for 2xs - 16px

xs.description: Mobile select chevron icon size for xs - 16px

3xs.description: Mobile select leading icon size for 3xs - 12px

2xs.description: Mobile select leading icon size for 2xs - 16px

xs.description: Mobile select leading icon size for xs - 16px

3xs.description: Mobile select search icon size for 3xs - 12px

2xs.description: Mobile select search icon size for 2xs - 16px

xs.description: Mobile select search icon size for xs - 16px

avatar.$comment: Avatar sizes for avatar-leading variant in mobile select fields

xs.description: Mobile select avatar size for xs - 40px

color.$comment: Color tokens for mobile select states - includes default (neutral) variant with interaction states (placeholder, default, open, disabled)

default.$comment: Default mobile select colors with neutral palette for standard selection

disabled.description: Mobile select disabled background for 3xs size - gray/100 - #f2f4f7

icon-leading.$comment: Leading icon color for icon-leading variant

default.description: Mobile select leading icon default - gray/500 - #667085

disabled.description: Mobile select leading icon disabled - gray/300 - #d0d5dd

icon-search.$comment: Search icon color for search variant

default.description: Mobile select search icon default - gray/500 - #667085

disabled.description: Mobile select search icon disabled - gray/300 - #d0d5dd

placeholder.description: Mobile select chevron icon placeholder - gray/500 - #667085

default.description: Mobile select chevron icon default - gray/500 - #667085

open.description: Mobile select chevron icon open/focused - gray/500 - #667085

disabled.description: Mobile select chevron icon disabled - gray/300 - #d0d5dd

tags.$comment: Tag-related tokens for tags variant in mobile select fields

xs.description: Gap between tags for xs size - 6px

between-tags-and-input.description: Gap between tags and input text - 8px
